entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume used as a green manuring crop to enhance sugarcane production

entities.name: SUGARCANE
entities.description: The primary crop whose production is being enhanced by the use of pigeonpea

entities.name: THAILAND
entities.description: The country where the study on pigeonpea and sugarcane production was conducted

entities.name: KHON KAEN
entities.description: A specific location in Thailand where the assessment study was undertaken

entities.name: UDON THANI
entities.description: A specific location in Thailand where the assessment study was undertaken

entities.name: GREEN MANURING
entities.description: The practice of growing and incorporating pigeonpea into the soil to improve fertility

entities.name: CHEMICAL FERTILIZER
entities.description: Synthetic nutrients used in sugarcane production that can be reduced by green manuring

entities.name: NPK FERTILIZER
entities.description: A specific type of chemical fertilizer substituted by green manuring pigeonpea

entities.name: NET PRESENT VALUE
entities.description: A financial metric used to calculate the benefits accruing to the study area

entities.name: INTERNAL RATE OF RETURN
entities.description: A financial metric representing the profitability of the adoption of green manuring pigeonpea

entities.name: UNIT COST
entities.description: The cost per unit of production, which is reduced by using green manuring pigeonpea

relationships.description: used as a green manuring crop
